module_info.docstring:
Socket-based daemon that holds indexes in memory.

Features:
- Loads call_graph.json, semantic embeddings on start
- Builds symbol_index from call_graph for O(1) lookups
- Handles: search, impact, extract, ping, status commands
- Auto-shutdown after 30min idle
- Persists indexes to .tldrs/ for fast restart

P5 Features (Incremental Performance):
- ContentHashedIndex: Skip unchanged files via content hashing
- SalsaDB: Memoize query results with automatic invalidation
- File change notifications trigger cache invalidation

classes.name: TLDRDaemon
classes.docstring:
TLDR daemon server holding indexes in memory.

Listens on a Unix socket for commands and responds with JSON.
Automatically shuts down after IDLE_TIMEOUT seconds of inactivity.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initialize the daemon for a project.

Args:
    project_path: Root path of the project to index

methods.name: _compute_socket_path
methods.docstring: Compute deterministic socket path from project path.

methods.name: _load_semantic_config
methods.docstring:
Load semantic search configuration.

Checks for config in:
1. .claude/settings.json (Claude Code settings)
2. .tldrs/config.json (TLDR-specific settings)

Returns default config if no file found.

methods.name: _get_connection_info
methods.docstring:
Return (address, port) - port is None for Unix sockets.

On Windows, uses TCP on localhost with a deterministic port.
On Unix (Linux/macOS), uses Unix domain sockets.

methods.name: is_idle
methods.docstring: Check if daemon has been idle longer than IDLE_TIMEOUT.

methods.name: handle_command
methods.docstring:
Route and handle a command.

Args:
    command: Dict with 'cmd' key and optional parameters

Returns:
    Response dict with 'status' and command-specific fields

methods.name: _handle_ping
methods.docstring: Handle ping command.

methods.name: _handle_status
methods.docstring: Handle status command with P5 cache statistics.

methods.name: _handle_shutdown
methods.docstring: Handle shutdown command.

methods.name: _handle_search
methods.docstring: Handle search command with SalsaDB caching.

methods.name: _handle_extract
methods.docstring: Handle extract command with SalsaDB caching.

methods.name: _handle_impact
methods.docstring: Handle impact command - find callers of a function.

methods.name: _ensure_call_graph_loaded
methods.docstring: Load call graph if not already loaded.

methods.name: _handle_dead
methods.docstring: Handle dead code analysis command.

methods.name: _handle_arch
methods.docstring: Handle architecture analysis command.

methods.name: _handle_cfg
methods.docstring: Handle CFG extraction command.

methods.name: _handle_dfg
methods.docstring: Handle DFG extraction command.

methods.name: _handle_slice
methods.docstring: Handle program slice command.

methods.name: _handle_calls
methods.docstring: Handle call graph building command.

methods.name: _handle_warm
methods.docstring: Handle cache warming command (builds call graph cache).

methods.name: _handle_semantic
methods.docstring:
Handle semantic search/index command.

Caches the search backend instance for fast repeated queries.
ColBERT model stays resident (~900MB RSS) after first load.

methods.name: _handle_tree
methods.docstring: Handle file tree command.

methods.name: _handle_structure
methods.docstring: Handle code structure command.

methods.name: _handle_context
methods.docstring: Handle relevant context command.

methods.name: _handle_context_delta
methods.docstring: Handle context command with delta mode (uncached, session-aware).

methods.name: _handle_imports
methods.docstring: Handle imports extraction command.

methods.name: _handle_importers
methods.docstring: Handle reverse import lookup command.

methods.name: _ensure_dedup_index_loaded
methods.docstring: Load or create ContentHashedIndex for file deduplication.

methods.name: _save_dedup_index
methods.docstring: Persist ContentHashedIndex to disk.

methods.name: _handle_notify
methods.docstring:
Handle file change notification from hooks.

Tracks dirty files and triggers background semantic re-indexing
when threshold is reached.

Args:
    command: Dict with 'file' (path to changed file)

Returns:
    Response with dirty count and reindex status

methods.name: _trigger_background_reindex
methods.docstring:
Trigger background semantic re-indexing.

Spawns a subprocess to rebuild the semantic index,
allowing the daemon to continue serving requests.

methods.name: _handle_diagnostics
methods.docstring:
Handle diagnostics command - type check + lint.

Runs pyright for type checking and ruff for linting.
Returns structured errors for pre-test validation.

Args:
    command: Dict with optional:
        - file: Single file to check
        - project: If True, check whole project
        - no_lint: If True, skip ruff (type check only)

Returns:
    Response with errors list and summary

methods.name: _handle_change_impact
methods.docstring:
Handle change-impact command - find affected tests.

Uses call graph to find what tests are affected by changed files.
Two-method discovery:
1. Call graph traversal: tests that call changed functions
2. Import analysis: tests that import changed modules

Args:
    command: Dict with optional:
        - files: List of changed file paths
        - session: If True, use session's dirty files
        - git: If True, use git diff to find changed files

Returns:
    Response with affected tests list

methods.name: notify_file_changed
methods.docstring:
Notify daemon that a file has changed.

This invalidates cached queries that depend on this file.

Args:
    file_path: Absolute path to the changed file

methods.name: write_pid_file
methods.docstring: Write daemon PID to .tldrs/daemon.pid.

methods.name: remove_pid_file
methods.docstring: Remove the PID file.

methods.name: write_status
methods.docstring: Write status to .tldrs/status file.

methods.name: read_status
methods.docstring: Read status from .tldrs/status file.

methods.name: _create_socket
methods.docstring: Create and bind the socket (legacy method, calls _create_server_socket).

methods.name: _create_server_socket
methods.docstring:
Create appropriate socket for platform.

On Windows, creates a TCP socket bound to localhost.
On Unix, creates a Unix domain socket.

Returns:
    Configured and bound socket ready for listening.

methods.name: _cleanup_socket
methods.docstring: Clean up the socket.

methods.name: _handle_one_connection
methods.docstring: Handle a single client connection.

methods.name: run
methods.docstring: Run the daemon main loop.

functions.name: start_daemon
functions.docstring:
Start the TLDR daemon for a project.

Args:
    project_path: Path to the project root
    foreground: If True, run in foreground; otherwise daemonize

functions.name: _create_client_socket
functions.docstring:
Create appropriate client socket for platform.

Args:
    daemon: TLDRDaemon instance to get connection info from

Returns:
    Connected socket ready for communication

functions.name: stop_daemon
functions.docstring:
Stop the TLDR daemon for a project.

Args:
    project_path: Path to the project root

Returns:
    True if daemon was stopped, False if not running

functions.name: query_daemon
functions.docstring:
Send a command to the daemon and get the response.

Args:
    project_path: Path to the project root
    command: Command dict to send

Returns:
    Response dict from daemon
